0._value: Hersha already sent Nineheart the report. He may be cautious, but he sure works fast! Discuss the details of the report with Nineheart.

1._value: Nineheart finally acknowledges the severity of the situation. He apologized for his lack of manners and is allowing you to meet Empress Cygnus in person. Meet the Empress and ask for help.

2._value: Empress Cygnus greeted you with kindness. The lack of suspicion was refreshing.

rewardSummary._value: #Wbasic#\n#fUI/UIWindow2.img/QuestIcon/8/0# 3,201\nCan proceed to the Scaling the El Nath Mountains quest

0._value: Welcome to Ereve. Nineheart told me everything. It can't be easy to carry out Nineheart's grueling requests on a strange world, but you've put all of our minds at ease. Thank you for all of your hard work.

1._value: According to reports from Hersha and others, Nobunaga and his army were behind the monster disturbances. Some reports even say that Nobunaga conspires to ally with the nefarious Black Wings.

2._value: This means that you're no longer the only one in danger now. My knights and other powerful forces in Maple World will need to help stop Oda and the Black Wings.

3._value: I already got in touch with Athena Pierce in Henesys, and I'll reach out to other heroes all around Maple World. I'll ask for full cooperation from your people as well. Would you deliver the message to them?

0._value: I hope that we can work together to bring peace to Maple World and your people.
The Empress is with Shinsoo over to the right. Please mind your manners.
